meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: I am... Extinguished.
So ... long ... where is my Lord of Fire, why does he not answer my call?
All night elf children learn to love the dark.
Beaten? How! You are... nothing
I will not be stopped! I have fought too long, suffered too much. Victory must be mine!
So be it. I will slay you all.
And now you fools have fallen into my trap. Let's see how you fare in the dark.
I have what I was after. But I stayed just so that I could put an end to you... once and for all!
Vengeance will be mine!
quotes.transcript: Vengeance will be mine!

quotes.text: Judge me all you like, sister, but you cannot stop us.
quotes.transcript: Judge me all you like, sister, but you cannot stop us.

quotes.text: We suspect the shadow council have corrupted the area.
quotes.transcript: We suspect the shadow council have corrupted the area.

quotes.text: I'm going ahead to the demon's lair. We'll capture it together.
quotes.transcript: I'm going ahead to the demon's lair. We'll capture it together.

quotes.text: Watch your step, it's a long way down.
quotes.transcript: Watch your step, it's a long way down.

quotes.text: You are using the tools of our enemy.
quotes.transcript: You are using the tools of our enemy.

quotes.text: And now you fools have brought me the key. I'll thank you to hand it over, willingly or otherwise.
quotes.transcript: And now you fools have brought me the key. I'll thank you to hand it over, willingly or otherwise.

quotes.text: CADGAR brought our group out here to deal with a strange taint on the nearby woods.
quotes.transcript: CADGAR brought our group out here to deal with a strange taint on the nearby woods.

quotes.text: Hurry then, the Wardens are coming with the Illidarian Toe.
quotes.transcript: Hurry then, the Wardens are coming with the Illidarian Toe.

quotes.text: Archmage, be careful.
quotes.transcript: Archmage, be careful.

quotes.text: Champion, the Archmage!
quotes.transcript: Champion, the Archmage!

quotes.text: The Archmage is expecting you.
quotes.transcript: The Archmage is expecting you.

quotes.text: Well done. I'll take it back to the outpost and see that it's secured.
quotes.transcript: Well done. I'll take it back to the outpost and see that it's secured.

quotes.text: Katgar, someone's here.
quotes.transcript: Katgar, someone's here.

quotes.text: I knew it. You should have stayed back at the Garrison Archmage.
quotes.transcript: I knew it. You should have stayed back at the Garrison Archmage.

quotes.text: The orb of dominion spoke to me. I saw the truth!
quotes.transcript: The orb of dominion spoke to me. I saw the truth!

quotes.text: Very well. Walk away. Nothing will stop Gul'dan, for the Legion stands behind him. Mark my words, your leaders will betray you. Azeroth will burn.
quotes.transcript: Very well. Walk away. Nothing will stop Gul'dan, for the Legion stands behind him. Mark my words, your leaders will betray you. Azeroth will burn.

quotes.text: Your death was inevitable.
quotes.transcript: Your death was inevitable.

quotes.text: Ah, we've been expecting you. How is KADGAR?
quotes.transcript: Ah, we've been expecting you. How is KADGAR?

quotes.text: Every Shadow Council member we kill now is one less headache later.
quotes.transcript: Every Shadow Council member we kill now is one less headache later.

quotes.text: It sounds like they've conjured demonic eye sentries. Be careful down there.
quotes.transcript: It sounds like they've conjured demonic eye sentries. Be careful down there.

quotes.text: We're certain the Shadow Council is involved, but we've yet to pinpoint them.
quotes.transcript: We're certain the Shadow Council is involved, but we've yet to pinpoint them.

quotes.text: I was just explaining the situation.
quotes.transcript: I was just explaining the situation.

quotes.text: Mark Mage, look out!
quotes.transcript: Mark Mage, look out!

quotes.text: Be careful, champion.
quotes.transcript: Be careful, champion.

quotes.text: Ishnu Allah, Commander. Over here.
quotes.transcript: Ishnu Allah, Commander. Over here.

quotes.text: Come on, this way!
quotes.transcript: Come on, this way!

quotes.text: The front lines are faltering. They cannot hold for much longer.
quotes.transcript: The front lines are faltering. They cannot hold for much longer.

quotes.text: I do not like this.
quotes.transcript: I do not like this.

quotes.text: Khaadgar is just a child swaggering around, torturing his prisoners, playing with lives, dabbling in magics he pretends to comprehend.
quotes.transcript: Khaadgar is just a child swaggering around, torturing his prisoners, playing with lives, dabbling in magics he pretends to comprehend.

quotes.text: How utterly predictable. I knew that you would come.
quotes.transcript: How utterly predictable. I knew that you would come.

quotes.text: I already have this Argyraid Keystone, but I stayed, just so that I could put an end to you once and for all.
quotes.transcript: I already have this Argyraid Keystone, but I stayed, just so that I could put an end to you once and for all.

quotes.text: Death embraces you. Perhaps not for the first time.
quotes.transcript: Death embraces you. Perhaps not for the first time.

quotes.text: Your downfall is inevitable.
quotes.transcript: Your downfall is inevitable.

quotes.text: May the night shroud me in shadow.
quotes.transcript: May the night shroud me in shadow.

quotes.text: Be wary, an old friend is here.
quotes.transcript: Be wary, an old friend is here.

quotes.text: Kill them, Malinoth!
quotes.transcript: Kill them, Malinoth!

quotes.text: Cadgar will join us on the way. Come, Thrombar lies just over the ridge.
quotes.transcript: Cadgar will join us on the way. Come, Thrombar lies just over the ridge.

quotes.text: I've been scouting the dunes, a demonic force has infected some of the beasts.
quotes.transcript: I've been scouting the dunes, a demonic force has infected some of the beasts.

quotes.text: Watch yourself out there. Those things come out of nowhere.
quotes.transcript: Watch yourself out there. Those things come out of nowhere.

quotes.text: I will stay with the Archmage and find help. Quickly, Captcha, Girona.
quotes.transcript: I will stay with the Archmage and find help. Quickly, Captcha, Girona.

quotes.text: Kedgar, stop! What's the difference between this and torture?
quotes.transcript: Kedgar, stop! What's the difference between this and torture?

quotes.text: I don't even know what you're fighting for anymore.
quotes.transcript: I don't even know what you're fighting for anymore.

quotes.text: Huh, it worked!
quotes.transcript: Huh, it worked!

quotes.text: Incredible work! The Archmage would be lost without you.
quotes.transcript: Incredible work! The Archmage would be lost without you.

quotes.text: Always vigilant.
quotes.transcript: Always vigilant.

quotes.text: The outpost is only a short distance up the hill. Come, the Ark Mage awaits.
quotes.transcript: The outpost is only a short distance up the hill. Come, the Ark Mage awaits.

quotes.text: A veil that reeks of fell magic shrouds the woods and the shadow moon orc village beyond.
quotes.transcript: A veil that reeks of fell magic shrouds the woods and the shadow moon orc village beyond.

quotes.text: We think the Shadow Council have overtaken the village, but Cadgar doesn't want to make a move until we know what they're up to.
quotes.transcript: We think the Shadow Council have overtaken the village, but Cadgar doesn't want to make a move until we know what they're up to.

quotes.text: We must pierce the veil that shrouds their activity. There's a plan, but we need your aid.
quotes.transcript: We must pierce the veil that shrouds their activity. There's a plan, but we need your aid.

quotes.text: This isn't going to be easy. Wanna help me capture a demon?
quotes.transcript: This isn't going to be easy. Wanna help me capture a demon?

quotes.text: Come, foul creature.
quotes.transcript: Come, foul creature.

quotes.text: It'd be easier to guard you if you stayed out of sight, CADGAR.
quotes.transcript: It'd be easier to guard you if you stayed out of sight, CADGAR.

quotes.text: You're right, you're not going out there.
quotes.transcript: You're right, you're not going out there.

quotes.text: We are yours to command.
quotes.transcript: We are yours to command.

quotes.text: Very well. I'll meet you there. Stay safe.
quotes.transcript: Very well. I'll meet you there. Stay safe.

quotes.text: Ugh, I can feel the dark energy surrounding you. What is that thing?
quotes.transcript: Ugh, I can feel the dark energy surrounding you. What is that thing?

quotes.text: Archmage, that is dark magic you're working with.
quotes.transcript: Archmage, that is dark magic you're working with.

quotes.text: Give me that orb, Katkar. I will destroy that hideous thing.
quotes.transcript: Give me that orb, Katkar. I will destroy that hideous thing.

quotes.text: Watch yourself champion. The Shadow Council will pray on your doubts and weaknesses.
quotes.transcript: Watch yourself champion. The Shadow Council will pray on your doubts and weaknesses.

quotes.text: Books. Yes, Gul'dan's tomes. Are you sure Cadgar didn't try to use them?
quotes.transcript: Books. Yes, Gul'dan's tomes. Are you sure Cadgar didn't try to use them?

quotes.text: Books of power, books of knowledge, books written in the language of chaos. Don't you worry, champion, all will be destroyed.
quotes.transcript: Books of power, books of knowledge, books written in the language of chaos. Don't you worry, champion, all will be destroyed.

quotes.text: Now, give me your ring. I need it. Give it here.
quotes.transcript: Now, give me your ring. I need it. Give it here.

quotes.text: Then I will take it from you, for the glory of Gul'dan!
quotes.transcript: Then I will take it from you, for the glory of Gul'dan!

quotes.text: Such is the power of the Legion!
quotes.transcript: Such is the power of the Legion!

quotes.text: So here's the key to Azeroth's downfall.
quotes.transcript: So here's the key to Azeroth's downfall.

quotes.text: Come do your best. Nightglaive has been undergoing some changes.
quotes.transcript: Come do your best. Nightglaive has been undergoing some changes.

quotes.text: We are ready for you.
quotes.transcript: We are ready for you.

quotes.text: You should know better than to challenge a warden.
quotes.transcript: You should know better than to challenge a warden.

quotes.text: The best prison needs no walls.
quotes.transcript: The best prison needs no walls.

quotes.text: A Wardens' Glaive can be the toughest armor.
quotes.transcript: A Wardens' Glaive can be the toughest armor.

quotes.text: My powers have grown since joining the Legion. Here, let me show you.
quotes.transcript: My powers have grown since joining the Legion. Here, let me show you.

quotes.text: How utterly predictable, myev is nothing if not persistent.
quotes.transcript: How utterly predictable, myev is nothing if not persistent.

quotes.text: I knew she had that artifact secreted away after the events at the Black Temple.
quotes.transcript: I knew she had that artifact secreted away after the events at the Black Temple.

quotes.text: Feel the fel energy course through.
quotes.transcript: Feel the fel energy course through.

quotes.text: Felsworn Nightglaive, prove yourself. I have other matters to attend to.
quotes.transcript: Felsworn Nightglaive, prove yourself. I have other matters to attend to.

quotes.text: I have committed no crime, Tirathon. Whereas you and your associates have to answer for yours!
We protect life, often at great risk.  Too often at great cost.
I will make my way to the surface, but you should inform the other wardens of what you have accomplished today.
May the night shroud you in shadow, and the moon illuminate your foes.
The traitor is defeated. Thank you, we owe you a great debt.
Can you say the same as you stand there intoxicated with the power of the Legion?
I live to serve my people, my goddess; expecting neither personal gain nor glory.
If you intend to venture deeper you will find far more terrifying things lurking in our Vault.
Thank you for your help. Your intervention saved my life.
If only I could see the future...
Visitors? How exciting!
Watch your step!
quotes.transcript: Watch your step!

quotes.text: Didn't see that one coming, did you?
quotes.transcript: Didn't see that one coming, did you?

quotes.text: You can watch from the floor.
quotes.transcript: You can watch from the floor.

quotes.text: Follow the bouncing ball.
quotes.transcript: Follow the bouncing ball.

quotes.text: Time to focus!
quotes.transcript: Time to focus!

quotes.text: Look into my eye.
quotes.transcript: Look into my eye.

quotes.text: Curse the wardens and their mirrors!
quotes.transcript: Curse the wardens and their mirrors!

quotes.text: That didn't look that close!
quotes.transcript: That didn't look that close!

quotes.text: I look forward to my next set of guests.
quotes.transcript: I look forward to my next set of guests.

quotes.text: How terribly disappointing.
Let's see what's behind door number...
Ooohh... New subjects.
Your souls are mine.
Your souls are mine.
quotes.transcript: Your souls are mine.

quotes.text: A pity.
quotes.transcript: A pity.

quotes.text: Death becomes you.
quotes.transcript: That becomes you.

quotes.text: Playtime has ended.
quotes.transcript: Playtime has ended.

quotes.text: F challenge!
quotes.transcript: F challenge!

quotes.text: And what was my reward?  Eternal torment from my "sisters."
Anger, hate, rage! These will fuel me with the power I crave!
Crimes? Our crime was to sacrifice everything to save this world.
I gave of my flesh, my soul; my people shun me as a freak.
I will serve MY people, the exiled and the reviled.
I will slay you and all your kin; and when I'm done I will fulfill the dreams of my mentor.
I wonder what this pool will reveal about you, Drelanim.
It's so good to fight again.
My blades hunger.
My power.. Wasn't enough?
My powers wane, I must have more!
We fought for Illidan, you imprisoned the world's villains here for all eternity. And then you imprisoned us.
You dare speak of sacrifice to me?
My blades hunger.
quotes.transcript: My blades hunger.

quotes.text: I need no blade to defeat you.
quotes.transcript: I need no blade to defeat you.

quotes.text: I will cast you all aside...
quotes.transcript: I will cast you all aside!

quotes.text: Play with fire and you'll get burned.
quotes.transcript: Play with fire and you'll get burned!

quotes.text: My hatred flows through me.
quotes.transcript: My hatred flows through me!

quotes.text: Death is weakness leaving the universe.
quotes.transcript: Death is witness leaving the universe.

quotes.text: More power for my blades.
quotes.transcript: More power for my blades.

quotes.text: I cannot be stopped.
quotes.transcript: I cannot be stopped.

quotes.text: And I will unleash my fury upon you all!
quotes.transcript: And I will unleash my fury upon you all!
